IPL 2026 Auction: De Kock Returns, 1,005 Players Dropped

Dec 9, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

IPL 2026 Auction: Quinton de Kock Returns as BCCI Reduces Player Longlist

The IPL 2026 Auction is set to be one of the most exciting in recent years, with Quinton de Kock making a surprise return to the pool of available players. His re-entry has already caught the attention of franchises, raising anticipation for the bidding war.
